name: First Dates Ireland
overview:
The hit Channel 4 series First Dates, has come to Ireland and RTÉ2. In First Dates, single people from across Ireland come to the First Dates restaurant where they have a real blind date.

Joining maître D' Mateo Saina, are barman Ethan Miles, and waiters Alice, Pete and Libby, who help set the scene and give romance the best possible chance to flourish.

trailers.title: Dater Audrey Performs Her Party Trick on Barman Ethan | First Dates Ireland | RTÉ2
